romaji_title: Zongmen Li Chule Wo Dou Shi Wodi
native_title: 宗门里除了我都是卧底
source_description:
The legendary hacker was chased to death by the system's AI in order to save humanity, and unexpectedly became the leader of the first sect in another world. However, in order to deal with the situation of all undercover agents in the sect and the system crisis that came with it, Chen Ning just wanted to keep a low profile and wait and see, have a look. But like a cone in the bag, even though he was cold-faced and unparalleled and cared about the world, he was still among thousands of flowers, and each one was touched. Finally, with the help of the system agent Jiang Que, Chen Ning's domineering body shook, and both the enemy and ourselves just bow down and bow! The secrets of the world rushed to be opened to him, and he finally solved the crisis of annihilation.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
ko_description: 전설적인 해커가 인류를 구하기 위해 시스템 AI에게 쫓겨 죽음을 맞이했으나, 뜻밖에도 다른 세계에서 첫 번째 종파의 리더가 되었다. 그러나 종파 내부에 만연한 전부 첩자 상황과 시스템 위기를 해결하기 위해 천닝은 그저 조용히 지내며 지켜보기만 하려 했다. 하지만 차가운 얼굴과 뛰어난 실력으로 세상을 걱정하던 그는 수많은 꽃들 속에 섞여 각자의 감동을 받는다. 최종적으로 시스템 요원 장첩의 도움으로 천닝은 당당한 몸짓을 떨치고, 적과 아군 모두가 그에게 고개를 숙인다. 세계의 비밀이 속속 밝혀지며 결국 전멸 위기를 해소하게 된다.
